title: Homepage renders core UI sections
description: Verifies the homepage shows the search bar and key discovery sections for browsing local goods.

title: Tap a featured category shows category product listing
description: Verifies selecting a featured category leads to a product listing view for that category.

steps.description: Click on the first visible featured category tile

title: Open a product from homepage listing navigates to product detail URL
description: Verifies tapping a product card from the homepage leads to the product detail page.

steps.description: Click on the first visible "Product card"

title: Search bar accepts input and shows results on submit
description: Verifies users can type into the search bar and trigger a visible results state.

title: Banners show loading spinner before content appears
description: Verifies a loading spinner is shown while banner content is loading, then banners render.

steps.description: Wait for element "Banner loading" to disappear

title: Regional picks strip is visible and scrollable on homepage
description: Verifies the regional picks (Pilihan Daerah) section is present and can be explored.

steps.description: Click on the first visible "Regional pick"

title: Search for a valid keyword returns matching product results
description: Verifies that entering a keyword and running search shows a visible results list.

steps.description: Type "beras" into the search input field
Verify element "Search results list" is visible

title: Search results can be opened from the results list
description: Verifies that tapping a search result navigates away from the search page to a product detail page.

steps.description: Type "beras" into the search input field
Verify element "Search results list" is visible
Click on the first product result in the results list

title: Empty search input shows validation message or empty-state feedback
description: Verifies the UI prevents or clearly handles searching with an empty term.

steps.description: Verify text "Please enter a search term" is visible

title: Whitespace-only search is treated as empty and shows user feedback
description: Verifies that spaces-only input does not run a normal search and shows a validation/empty-state message.

steps.description: Type "   " into the search input field
Verify text "Please enter a search term" is visible

title: Search with a nonsense keyword shows an empty results state
description: Verifies the UI shows a clear empty-state when there are no matches.

steps.description: Type "zzzxqvnonexistent" into the search input field

title: Search is case-insensitive from the user perspective
description: Verifies that changing case of the same keyword still yields results (or at minimum does not error).

steps.description: Type "BERAS" into the search input field
Verify element "Search results list" is visible
Verify text "No results" is not visible

title: Running a second search replaces the prior results list
description: Verifies that a new search updates the visible results rather than keeping stale results.

steps.description: Type "beras" into the search input field
Verify element "Search results list" is visible
Type "zzzxqvnonexistent" into the search input field

title: Search page remains usable after viewing a product and returning to search
description: Verifies that after opening a result, the user can return to search and run another query.

steps.description: Type "beras" into the search input field
Click on the first product result in the results list
Click the "Back" or "Search" link/button on the page

title: Product Detail renders key sections (images, price, seller info, reviews, related products)
description: Verifies the product detail page loads and shows the core product information and supporting sections.

steps.description: Verify text "Order via WhatsApp" is visible

title: Order via WhatsApp redirects to wa.me with a pre-filled message (valid seller WhatsApp)
description: Verifies clicking the primary CTA opens the WhatsApp redirect URL when seller contact is available.

steps.description: Verify element "Order via WhatsApp" is visible

title: Order via WhatsApp shows error when seller contact is not available (no redirect)
description: Verifies the app shows the correct error message and does not redirect if the seller has no valid WhatsApp number.

steps.description: Verify element "Order via WhatsApp" is visible
Verify text "Seller contact not available" is visible

title: Product images are visible and can be changed (if multiple images exist)
description: Verifies the user can view the product image area and switch images using the on-page controls.

title: Seller information section is present and readable
description: Verifies seller details are visible on the product detail page for trust and ordering context.

title: Related products section is visible and allows navigation to another product
description: Verifies the related products list is shown and selecting a related item loads a different product detail page.

steps.description: Click on the first related product card
Verify text "Order via WhatsApp" is visible

title: Reviews section is visible and shows at least the empty state or existing reviews
description: Verifies the reviews area renders and communicates either review items or an empty state message.

title: Product description is visible and supports longer text without breaking the page
description: Verifies the product description section is present and can display longer content while keeping the CTA accessible.

steps.description: Verify element "Order via WhatsApp" is visible

title: Seller shop page shows seller header details
description: Verifies the seller storefront displays the seller name and WhatsApp contact information in the header area.

title: Browse seller product grid by scrolling
description: Verifies the user can scroll the seller product grid and continue seeing product listings.

title: Open a product from seller shop navigates to product details
description: Verifies tapping a product in the seller shop navigates to a product details page.

title: Seller shop shows seller not found state for unknown seller
description: Verifies an unknown seller route displays a clear 'Seller not found' message and a link back to the homepage.

steps.description: Verify text "Seller not found" is visible
Verify element "Back to home" is visible

title: Seller shop shows inactive seller state when seller is not active
description: Verifies an inactive seller displays a 'Seller is not active' message and provides navigation back to the homepage.

steps.description: Verify text "Seller is not active" is visible
Verify element "Back to home" is visible

title: Seller shop product grid remains visible after returning from product details via in-app navigation
description: Verifies the user can open a product and return using an in-app control without breaking the seller product list view.

title: Seller shop renders without products message when seller has no products
description: Verifies the seller shop shows an empty-state message when there are no products for the seller.

title: Browse categories from Etalase landing page
description: Verifies the catalog page loads and shows a visible list of categories for browsing.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the category list

title: Filter products by selecting a category that has products
description: Verifies selecting a category shows a filtered product list for that category.

steps.description: Click on a visible category that appears selectable (not disabled)
Verify element "at least one product card" is visible
Scroll to the bottom of the product list

title: Open a product details page from a filtered category
description: Verifies tapping a product from a category result navigates to a product detail URL.

steps.description: Click on a visible category that appears selectable (not disabled)
Click on the first visible product card

title: Empty-state shown for a category with no products
description: Verifies selecting an empty category shows the expected empty-state message and guidance.

steps.description: Click on a category that is expected to have no products (choose the first category that results in no product cards)
Verify text "No products in this category" is visible
Verify text "try another category" is visible
Verify element "product list" is not visible

title: Recover from empty category by selecting a different category
description: Verifies users can switch categories after an empty-state and see products for another category.

steps.description: Click on a category that results in the empty-state
Verify text "No products in this category" is visible
Click on a different visible category
Verify element "at least one product card" is visible

title: Category selection updates the visible content (products vs empty-state)
description: Verifies the page updates correctly when switching between categories with products and categories without products.

steps.description: Click on a visible category that shows at least one product card
Verify element "at least one product card" is visible
Click on a different category that results in the empty-state
Verify text "No products in this category" is visible
Click on the original category again
Verify element "at least one product card" is visible

title: Etalase page remains usable after reload via direct entry
description: Verifies the Etalase route can be opened directly and still shows categories for browsing.

steps.description: Wait for element "category list" to appear

title: Save a product to cart and start a WhatsApp order from the cart
description: Verifies a user can save a product to the cart, see it in /cart, and initiate an order via WhatsApp redirect.

steps.description: Click on the "Save to Cart" button
Verify text "Saved to cart" is visible
Click on the "Cart" link or cart icon in the app header/navigation
Verify the saved item is visible in the cart list
Click on "Order via WhatsApp" for the saved item

title: Saving the same product twice does not create duplicate cart entries
description: Verifies the cart handles repeated saves of the same product without showing duplicated line items.

steps.description: Click on the "Save to Cart" button
Verify text "Saved to cart" is visible
Click on the "Save to Cart" button
Click on the "Cart" link or cart icon in the app header/navigation
Verify the cart list shows only one entry for the product

title: Cart page empty state is shown when no items are saved
description: Verifies the cart page provides a clear empty state when there are no saved items.

steps.description: Verify text "Your cart is empty" is visible
Verify that an "Order via WhatsApp" button is not visible
Verify that a cart items list is not visible

title: Multiple saved items: order one item without removing other items
description: Verifies ordering one cart item via WhatsApp does not remove other saved items from the cart list.

steps.description: Click on the "Save to Cart" button
Verify text "Saved to cart" is visible
Click on the "Save to Cart" button
Verify two saved items are visible in the cart list
Click on "Order via WhatsApp" for one of the saved items

title: Cart item details are visible on the cart page
description: Verifies each cart item presents basic identifying info so low-literacy users can confirm what they saved.

steps.description: Click on the "Save to Cart" button
Verify the cart item name text is visible
Verify the seller name text is visible on the cart item
Verify the "Order via WhatsApp" button is visible for the cart item

title: Add a product to wishlist and verify it appears on the Wishlist page
description: Verifies a user can add a product to the wishlist and see it listed on the Wishlist page.

steps.description: Verify text "Added to wishlist" is visible
Click on "Wishlist" in the site navigation

title: Open a wishlisted product from the Wishlist page
description: Verifies a user can open a product details page by clicking a product in the wishlist.

steps.description: Verify text "Added to wishlist" is visible
Click on "Wishlist" in the site navigation
Click the wishlisted product in the list

title: Prevent duplicate wishlist entries when adding the same product twice
description: Verifies adding the same product again does not create duplicate entries in the wishlist.

steps.description: Verify text "Added to wishlist" is visible
Click the "Add to Wishlist" icon again
Verify text "Added to wishlist" is visible
Click on "Wishlist" in the site navigation

title: Remove a product from wishlist from the Wishlist page
description: Verifies a user can remove an item from the wishlist and it no longer appears in the list.

steps.description: Verify text "Added to wishlist" is visible
Click on "Wishlist" in the site navigation
Click the "Remove from Wishlist" icon for the listed product
Verify text "Removed from wishlist" is visible

title: Wishlist persists after page reload
description: Verifies wishlist contents remain after reloading the Wishlist page (client-side persistence).

steps.description: Verify text "Added to wishlist" is visible
Click on "Wishlist" in the site navigation
Verify the wishlisted product is visible
Verify the wishlisted product is visible

title: E-Learning module list page loads and shows modules
description: Verifies the E-Learning landing page renders a visible list of learning modules.

steps.description: Verify element "module list item" is visible

title: Open a module from the list and view module detail content
description: Verifies a user can open a module from the list and see its content on the module detail page.

steps.description: Click on the first "module list item"

title: Module detail page shows lessons section when opened from a module card
description: Verifies the module detail view includes a visible lessons section for the selected module.

steps.description: Click on the first "module list item"

title: E-Learning module list handles empty state gracefully
description: Verifies the E-Learning page shows a clear empty state when there are no modules to display.

title: Admin can view dashboard widgets after logging in
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can access the Admin Dashboard and see core analytics widgets.

steps.description: Verify text "Top clicked products" is visible

title: Admin dashboard shows WhatsApp click metrics widget
description: Verifies the dashboard includes a visible section for WhatsApp click metrics.

title: Admin can open a top product from dashboard and reach edit page
description: Verifies clicking an item in the Top clicked products list routes to the product edit screen.

steps.description: Verify text "Top clicked products" is visible
Click on the first product shown in the "Top clicked products" widget

title: Admin dashboard renders top searches list content area
description: Verifies the Top searches widget is present and shows a list area (even if empty).

steps.description: Verify element "Top searches" widget is visible

title: Admin dashboard renders seller performance section
description: Verifies the seller performance widget/section is visible on the dashboard.

title: Create a new shop with required fields and save successfully
description: Verifies an admin can create a new shop and see it listed in the shops table after saving.

steps.description: Type "Green Valley Farms" into the seller name field
Type "+15551234567" into the WhatsApp number field
Verify text "Green Valley Farms" is visible

title: Validate WhatsApp number is required on new shop form
description: Verifies the form shows a required-field validation message and does not save when WhatsApp number is missing.

steps.description: Type "No WhatsApp Seller" into the seller name field
Verify text "WhatsApp number is required" is visible

title: Prevent saving when seller name is empty (required field validation)
description: Verifies the new shop form blocks saving and shows a validation message when the seller name is missing.

steps.description: Type "+15550001111" into the WhatsApp number field
Verify text "Name is required" is visible

title: Reject invalid WhatsApp number format on new shop form
description: Verifies the form shows an error and prevents saving when the WhatsApp number format is invalid.

steps.description: Type "Invalid WhatsApp Format Seller" into the seller name field
Type "not-a-number" into the WhatsApp number field
Verify text "Invalid WhatsApp number" is visible

title: Cancel out of new shop creation without saving
description: Verifies an admin can leave the new shop form via Cancel/Back without creating a shop.

steps.description: Type "Should Not Save Seller" into the seller name field
Type "+15559998888" into the WhatsApp number field
Verify text "Should Not Save Seller" is not visible

title: Create a new product successfully from Admin Products list
description: Verifies an admin can create a product and see it listed in the admin products table after saving.

steps.description: Type "Test Product Alpha" into the "Product name" field
Select the first available option from the "Seller" dropdown
Select the first available option from the "Category" dropdown

title: Validation blocks save when required fields are missing on New Product
description: Verifies the New Product form prevents saving when required fields (like name/seller/category/price) are not provided.

title: Edit an existing product and save changes
description: Verifies an admin can open an existing product edit screen, change fields, and save successfully.

steps.description: Click on the first visible "Edit" button in the products list

title: Toggle Featured flag on Edit Product
description: Verifies an admin can toggle the Featured flag and save the change.

steps.description: Click on the first visible "Edit" button in the products list
Click on the "Featured" checkbox or toggle

title: Delete an existing product from Admin Products list
description: Verifies an admin can delete a product and it no longer appears in the admin products list.

steps.description: Click on the first visible "Delete" button in the products list

title: Cancel out of New Product without saving
description: Verifies an admin can leave the New Product form without creating a product using a Cancel/Back control.

steps.description: Type "Test Product Not Saved" into the "Product name" field
Verify text "Test Product Not Saved" is not visible

title: New banner form blocks save when no image is provided
description: Verifies the new banner form shows a validation error and does not save when the banner image is missing.

steps.description: Verify text "Banner image required" is visible

title: Cancel out of new banner creation without saving
description: Verifies an admin can leave the new banner page using cancel/back UI and the banner is not created.

title: Edit an existing banner link and verify list reflects the change
description: Verifies an admin can open an existing banner for editing, change its link, save, and see the update in the marketing list.

steps.description: Click on "Edit" for the first banner in the list

title: Remove an existing banner and verify it no longer appears in the list
description: Verifies an admin can delete a banner and it is removed from the Admin Marketing list.

steps.description: Click on "Delete" for the first banner in the list

title: New banner form blocks save when link format is invalid (if link field is validated)
description: Verifies the new banner form shows a validation error and does not save when the link is not a valid URL (if URL validation is implemented).

title: Add a product to Trending and verify it appears in the Trending list
description: Verifies an admin can add a product to the trending list and sees it listed afterward.

steps.description: Select the first available product from the product list dropdown
Verify the selected product name is visible in the trending list

title: Cancel adding a Trending product does not change the list
description: Verifies exiting the add flow without saving does not add a new trending product.

steps.description: Verify text "Select product" is not visible

title: Attempt to save Trending without selecting a product shows validation and does not add
description: Verifies the Save action is blocked or shows an error when no product is selected.

steps.description: Verify text "Selected product not found" is not visible

title: Attempt to add a deleted product shows 'Selected product not found' and does not add
description: Verifies selecting a product that no longer exists results in the expected error and no list update.

steps.description: Select the product option labeled "(deleted)" or an option that indicates it is missing (if present)
Verify text "Selected product not found" is visible
Verify the selected product name is not visible in the trending list

title: Add Trending then verify homepage shows highlighted Trending section
description: Verifies that after adding a trending item, the highlighted homepage section reflects the change.

steps.description: Select the first available product from the product list dropdown
Verify the selected product name is visible in the trending list
Click on "Home" in the primary navigation
